description: Synthetic toy targets for Phase V M53 reference study. All values are eigenvalue RATIOS (ratio of eigenvalue i to eigenvalue 0). All targets use targetProvenance=synthetic-toy-v1 and evidenceTier=toy-placeholder with 30-50% uncertainties.

targets.label: bosonic-mode-1-ratio
targets.notes: Ratio of second bosonic eigenvalue to first; 40% uncertainty (toy placeholder)

targets.label: bosonic-mode-2-ratio
targets.notes: Ratio of third bosonic eigenvalue to first; 40% uncertainty (toy placeholder)

targets.label: bosonic-mode-3-ratio
targets.notes: Ratio of fourth bosonic eigenvalue to first; 40% uncertainty (toy placeholder)

targets.label: fermionic-mode-1-ratio
targets.notes: Ratio of second fermionic eigenvalue to first; 40% uncertainty (toy placeholder)

targets.label: fermionic-mode-2-ratio
targets.notes: Ratio of third fermionic eigenvalue to first; 40% uncertainty (toy placeholder)
